title: Ocugen Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ocugen Q4 2023 Earnings Call Summary. Key Business Developments: Ocugen announced significant progress in its gene therapy pipeline for blindness diseases. The company achieved FDA alignment on its OCU400 phase 3 trial design for retinitis pigmentosa, with an anticipated start date in April 2024. Clinical Milestones: OCU400 Program: The company highlighted compelling phase 1/2 results demonstrating improvement or preservation in eyes treated with OCU400 across multiple efficacy measurements. The phase 3 trial will enroll 150 patients across two arms—rhodopsin-specific and gene-agnostic—positioning it as the only gene therapy in phase 3 with broad RP designation. OCU410/OCU410ST: Cohort 1 dosing completed in both trials. The Data Safety Monitoring Board approved progression to medium-dose cohort in the OCU410ST study for Stargardt Disease, which received orphan drug designation. Financial Position: As of December 31, 2023, the company held $39.5 million in cash, cash equivalents, and investments, sufficient to fund operations into Q4 2024. The company will restate 2022 and Q1-Q3 2023 financial statements due to noncash accounting errors. Market Outlook: Management emphasized the growing gene therapy market, projected to surpass $30 billion by the end of the decade.
